title: Lady Alicia in Red : Beginning (2025) AI NFT 300pixs collection by Stefano Dorian Franco

# Lady Alicia in Red : Beginning (2025) AI NFT 300pixs collection by Stefano Dorian Franco

Creator: Stefano Dorian Franco
Date: 2024-01-25T00:00:00Z
Downloads: 846
Subjects: Stefano Dorian Franco, Lady Alicia in Red

A contemporary art/digital art work created in Turin, Italy by the Parisian Italo-French multidisciplinary cultural creator Stefano Dorian Franco in 2025. This creation, composed of a puzzle of 300 images generated by AI , is positioned within the design of an extended universe that spans across 4 dimensions : publication of digital cyber-comicBooks in eBOOK format, interactive exhibitions in augmented virtual reality AR/VR , transformation into NFTs on blockchain networks, and a matrix narrative base for videoGames ( VG ) and cine matic productions. This metaphysical fable with symbolic keys takes place in a dystopian future , where a mysterious, devastating global pandemic has plunged society into possibly irreversible chaos. Human structures are now under the control of an omnipresent artificial intelligence, gradually erasing individuality and human consciousness. Lady Alicia in Red , an iconic figure of resistance , fights against this oppression. After escaping a top-secret laboratory where experiments aimed at re-mastering the human mind are conducted, she embarks on an initiatory journey through a world reshaped by her own subconscious . Accompanied by psychedelic visions and confronted with profound moral dilemmas, she struggles to reclaim her identity, dignity, and freedom. This narrative questions the relationship within a neo-cyber trinity : human/machine/consciousness, offering a reflection on individuality, power, and rebellion for emancipation in a world dictated by fear and permanent crisis. Through this interactive experience , where the viewer is invited to let their own emotions and interpretations run free, the work proposes a reflection on our own future and the future of humanity in the face of the potential dangers of uncontrollable technological control. What form of resistance can the human being, by choice, find deep within themselves to survive and ultimately reclaim life ? Lady Alicia in Red: Beginning is the first volume of this adventure, published in 2025 .
